title: Greek Salad with Hearts of Palm and Avocado
ingredients: 1 tablespoon fresh herbs (mix of thyme, basil, oregano, parsley)
2 large heads red leaf lettuce, tom
1 can (14 ounces) hearts of palm, drained and sliced into rounds
instructions: Combine lemon juice, fines herbs, mustard, Worcestershire, salt, pepper, and garlic in a small bowl. Whisk in olive oil. When combined, stir in feta. Set aside.
Toss all lettuce in a salad bowl, then add remaining ingredients. Add dressing, toss and serve.
